goal: Predict bulk_modulus, density, tg for PSFO (*Oc1ccc(C(C)(C)c2ccc(Oc3ccc(S(=O)(=O)c4ccc(*)cc4)cc3)cc2)cc1)
assumptions: SMILES resolves to PSU (Udel, bisphenol-A polysulfone: isopropylidene + diaryl ether + diaryl sulfone). Pinned member exp targets: Tg=463 K, density~1.24-1.25 g/cm3, K_T=4.0-5.5 GPa. (PES=493 K is the para-only ether-sulfone member; this SMILES has the isopropylidene bridge => PSU.)
Glassy at 300 K (exp Tg 463 K >> 300 K): is_glassy=true, mechanical track uses glassy Murnaghan NPT compression at 300 K.

PSFO confidence=medium and IS in polymer_rules.json with class-specific temperatures => reasoned plan with in-table temps; skip estimate_tg_group_contribution.py (only for off-table / confidence=low).

uncertainties.name: ff_transferability
uncertainties.note: No class-specific PCFF MD Tg/density validation paper for polysulfones. PCFF Class II covers aryl-SO2-aryl + aryl ether via cross terms; used by analogy (PC Tg 417 vs exp 422). MD Tg for PSU expected ~540-580 K (overprediction) per polymer_rules notes.

uncertainties.name: hardware_optimum
uncertainties.note: directional_probe is HINT-only here: values_are_benchmarked=false, probe host (A800/RTX6000) not cleanly benchmarked, and est cell ~11.4k atoms is ~3.8x the 3020-atom pcff benchmark cell (outside [0.5x,2x]). Kept by_forcefield.pcff default; no multi-GPU pin (lacks benchmark support).

uncertainties.name: system_size_below_entanglement
uncertainties.note: DP=25 (MW~11,050) ~1 M_e for PSU: adequate for Tg, short of entanglement plateau for K. Murnaghan is less size-sensitive than deform; flag any K offset in summary.

evidence.claim: PCFF via EMC. Sun1994 (CFF93/PCFF) is the FF origin; no class-specific PCFF MD validation paper available yet (see Track G in ROADMAP.md).

alternatives.known_error: Tg error >45% for PMMA; not validated for aryl sulfone/ether. Rejected.
OPLS sulfone charges (~+1.3/-0.55 e) differ from PCFF native bond-increment (S~+0.08, O~-0.11); PCFF Class II cross terms preferred for rigid aromatic thermomechanics. EMC routes PSFO to PCFF.

evidence.claim: PCFF assigns charges via bond-increment rules (charge_method=none => no separate QM/Gasteiger step). Sulfone S~+0.08 e and sulfone O (o=)~-0.11 e per S-O bond are NATIVE PCFF increments (not OPLS/QM magnitudes). A charge of exactly 0.0000 on S or O indicates a MISSING frc increment, not a small value -- verify so2/o_2s atom types in EMC PCFF output before run.

Backbone contains heteroatoms (sulfone S, two sulfone O, ether O) carrying PCFF bond-increment partial charges. Per electrostatics_decision_guide, heteroatom-containing backbones MUST use pppm. Combined sulfone+ether polarity accumulates along the chain; neglecting long-range Coulomb biases density/Tg 5-20% for polar polymers. PPPM mandatory despite small per-atom magnitudes.

alternatives.known_error: valid only for pure C/H apolar (UA) backbones; would truncate aromatic+ether+sulfone Coulomb. Rejected.

evidence.claim: DP=25 >= Fox-Flory floor (DP>=20 required for Tg/K targets). MW~11,050 ~ 1 M_e for PSU: adequate for Tg, short of entanglement plateau for K. nchain=8 gives ~11,400 atoms. cutoff_A=12 with ~11.4k atoms avoids self-imaging.
Pinned exp targets for the resolved member PSU (Udel, bisphenol-A polysulfone): Tg=463 K, density~1.24-1.25 g/cm3, K_T=4.0-5.5 GPa. is_glassy=true (463>>300).

alternatives.known_error: at Fox-Flory floor; chosen DP=25 gives margin for the stiff aromatic backbone.

decisions.choice: require_glassy gate (DP>=30? no -> DP=25; use standard overall_pass with advisory melt-diffusion metrics for rigid aromatic backbone)

evidence.claim: Rigid aromatic main chain: C(t)/C-infinity is undefined via atom-type backbone (ct_gate_reliable=false, advisory only). 15 ns equil + 8 anneal cycles at T_equil=700 K (PES Tg 493 + 150 K, conservative for slow-relaxing rigid backbone) substitute for unattainable melt self-diffusion. Gate on density plateau within exp range + homogeneity CV<0.25 + P2 nematic<0.10 + energy drift/SEM; melt-diffusion metrics advisory.

decisions.choice: sweep 250-750 K @ 20 K step, rates [25,50,100] K/ns

evidence.claim: Sweep 250-750 K brackets exp PSU Tg=463 K and the expected MD Tg ~540-580 K with margin on both sides; 26 bins at 20 K step. Rates [25,50,100] K/ns at dt=1fs, tg_t_step=20 K give 800/400/200 ps per T -> all clear tg_min_steps_per_T floor (200000 steps=200ps). Retired [40,160,400] gave degenerate 50/125 ps fits.

alternatives.known_error: 160/400 fall below the 200 ps steps-per-T floor -> degenerate fits. Rejected.

decisions.choice: glassy Murnaghan NPT compression at 300 K (primary); deform fallback

evidence.claim: PSU is glassy at 300 K (exp Tg 463 K). Glassy bulk_modulus via Murnaghan NPT compression at 300 K (Wu 2019 Comput. Mater. Sci. validated; symmetric, cell-size independent). 3-direction uniaxial deform is fallback if Murnaghan fails (fit_converged=False or B0_prime outside [4,20]). Born+NVT REMOVED (PCFF+PPPM virial incompatibility). Exp K_T 4.0-5.5 GPa (Zoller 1978 PVT via Mark 2007 Table 7.6).
is_glassy from measured Tg>300K when tg requested; pinned exp Tg=463 K confirms glassy regime independent of any noisy fast-rate MD fit.

alternatives.known_error: PCFF+PPPM virial incompatibility: K_Born 8-15x too high, failed 3/3 runs (PMMA4/PVC1/PEEK1). Removed.

evidence.claim: FF family=pcff (class2 + pppm). Est cell ~11,400 all-atom (DP25 x nchain8 x 57 all-atom/monomer). by_forcefield.pcff default = kokkos full-offload, mpi=1, 1 GPU/run (kspace on GPU; mpi=1 canonical; run-0 parity 0.000% 2026-06-20). directional_probe is HINT-only: values_are_benchmarked=false AND probe host (A800/RTX6000, dated 2026-06-21) not the clean live host AND 11.4k atoms is ~3.8x the 3020-atom pcff benchmark cell (outside [0.5x,2x]). No multi-GPU pin: >10k atoms but multi-GPU requires benchmark support (recommended_by_ff.pcff.gpu=1), which is absent -> keep 1 GPU. Never mpi=1 anti-pattern does NOT apply (PCFF/KOKKOS kspace is on the GPU). DO NOT pack >1 PPPM run/GPU.

alternatives.known_error: needs benchmark support on a matching host for a >10k cell; none exists. Rejected.

findings: Gate verified independently: PSFO confidence=medium -> reasoned mode (matches plan_mode).
D-06 tg ladder floor recomputed: rates [25,50,100] K/ns at dt=1fs/step=20K -> 800/400/200 ps per T; all clear the 200 ps (200000-step) floor.

D-05 OK: equil success_criterion overall_pass=true is satisfiable for this DP=25 rigid-aromatic cell. The melt-diffusion metrics (C(t)/MSD/MSID/C-inf) are advisory in check_equilibration_comprehensive by default (only armed when ct_min_decay is passed); PSFO ct_gate_reliable=false makes gen_prompt pass ct_min_decay=null, so they never hard-gate regardless of DP. Remaining hard gates (density drift/SEM, energy, Rg CV<30%, P2<0.10, homogeneity CV<25%) are structural and achievable with 15 ns + 8-cycle anneal. D-05 prose is awkward ('require_glassy gate ... DP>=30? no') but lands on the correct standard-overall_pass behavior.

D-08 hardware OK: pin kokkos/mpi=1/gpu_per_run=1 is identical to BOTH by_forcefield.pcff AND recommended_by_ff.pcff (gpu1_mpi1) -> it is the policy default, not a non-default pin, so the staleness probe requirement does not bite. mpi=1 on KOKKOS PCFF is correct (kspace on GPU; mpi>=4 clause scopes to the gpu-package fallback). No multi-GPU pin for ~11.4k atoms; concurrent Sum(mpi)=1<=18. Live host A800 matches directional_probe.measured_on. ADVISORY: D-08 evidence prose carries stale 'HINT-only / not clean host' wording, but the decision lands on the default so the conclusion is unaffected.

ADVISORY (no bounce): D-03 electrostatics is evidence_required but cites source=electrostatics_decision_guide (no DOI/citation). pppm here is a hard-require rule application for a heteroatom backbone (mandated, not argued from literature), so a pointer to the governing guide is sufficient.

All 8 decisions cover their policy evaluate[] criteria; stage schema valid (required fields, valid_tracks, track_map all match); reduction_probes (literature_anchor/hardware_benchmark/none) are valid keys; dominant uncertainty ff_transferability named once.
